title: Add retry decorator for flakey tests
body:
* Update doc strings

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat That is the very flake we're trying to beat into submission. :) I added some debugging to see if I can determine more.
@TomSweeneyRedHat @baude Updating delay worked on this iteration.  Time will tell how much improvement we get.
Lets give it a go ... good show @jwhonce !

:pushpin: Commit bed2c06 has been approved by `baude`
